negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: mark_async_awaiting_delivery does not accept AwaitingExecution; it only transitions Fulfilled entries to AwaitingDelivery.
related_but_insufficient_code: AsyncTxMetadata::time_expiry_reference treats AwaitingExecution and Fulfilled similarly for expiry while awaiting delivery is pending.
mark_awaiting_delivery currently returns InvalidState unless metadata.state == AsyncState::Fulfilled.
Pool facade methods delegate to this strict mark_awaiting_delivery implementation.

notes: Insert a two-phase async pool entry in AwaitingExecution and call mark_async_awaiting_delivery; current code returns InvalidState instead of moving to AwaitingDelivery.
rationale: The state check changes from requiring Fulfilled only to allowing Fulfilled or AwaitingExecution, with comments identifying the race where on-chain Phase 1 settlement occurs before local result processing. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: mark_async_awaiting_delivery accepts two-phase async pool entries in either Fulfilled or AwaitingExecution state, allowing Phase 1 settlement to move a job toward delivery even if the executor result has not yet updated local pool state.
suggested_falsification_tests: Insert a two-phase async pool entry in AwaitingExecution and call mark_async_awaiting_delivery for its hash. Assert the transition succeeds. Repeat with an unrelated invalid state and assert InvalidState is returned.
summary: AwaitingExecution cannot move directly to awaiting delivery in the v2 port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Insert a two-phase async pool entry in AwaitingExecution and call mark_async_awaiting_delivery for its hash. Assert the transition succeeds. Repeat with an unrelated invalid state and assert InvalidState is returned.
title: AwaitingExecution can move to awaiting delivery
